MODULE: cosmos.cicd.jenkins_manager
FILE: cosmos/cicd/jenkins_manager.py (605 lines)
CATEGORY: cicd

DESCRIPTION: cosmos Jenkins Integration

"Jenkins? Is he the janitor?"

Jenkins CI/CD management via the Jenkins REST API.

CLASSES:
- JenkinsManager(CICDProvider): Jenkins CI/CD integration.

Features:
- Job management
- Build triggering and mo
  Methods: async def list_pipelines(self, repository: str=None) -> List[Pipeline]
  Methods: async def get_pipeline(self, pipeline_id: str) -> Optional[Pipeline]
  Methods: async def create_pipeline(self, pipeline: Pipeline) -> bool
  Methods: async def update_pipeline(self, pipeline: Pipeline) -> bool
  Methods: async def delete_pipeline(self, pipeline_id: str) -> bool
  Methods: async def get_job_config(self, job_name: str) -> Optional[str]
  Methods: async def enable_job(self, job_name: str) -> bool
  Methods: async def disable_job(self, job_name: str) -> bool
